title: Create's-cardboard
description: support create cardboard from forge to fabric
body:
**This mod adds Cardboard items and blocks from Create forge to fabric**


![photo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f47f7d1c3ce6745efbc065be152c3c3e517a0916.png)

author's telegram [channel](https://t.me/kltzqqu)
